---
title: "“Truncate, replicate, sample”: A method for creating integer weights for spatial microsimulation"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Dimitris Ballas (2013). “Truncate, replicate, sample”: A method for creating integer weights for spatial microsimulation. *Computers, Environment and Urban Systems*."
date: "2013-09-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_truncate_2013"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Computers, Environment and Urban Systems"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Dimitris Ballas"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Computers, Environment and Urban Systems
**Year:** 2013

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Dimitris Ballas (2013). “Truncate, replicate, sample”: A method for creating integer weights for spatial microsimulation. *Computers, Environment and Urban Systems*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_truncate_2013,
  title = {`{{Truncate}}, Replicate, Sample': {{A}} Method for Creating Integer Weights for Spatial Microsimulation},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Ballas, Dimitris},
  year = {2013},
  month = sep,
  journal = {Computers, Environment and Urban Systems},
  volume = {41},
  pages = {1--11},
  issn = {01989715},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
